news.headline: TAFE, largest shareholder of AGCO Corporation, urges management to address critical questions during upcoming Analyst Day.
news.summary: In Chennai, India, Tractors and Farm Equipment Limited (TAFE) holds a significant 16.3% long-term equity stake in AGCO Corporation (NYSE: AGCO). TAFE, the largest shareholder of AGCO, has requested the company's management to address key concerns during the upcoming Analyst Day on December 19, 2024, at 9 A.M. EST. TAFE considers these questions critical and essential for strategic discussions.

news.headline: Capital Square's DST offering for a build-for-rent community near Chattanooga, Tennessee, fully subscribed in record time.
news.summary: Today in Chattanooga, Tennessee, Capital Square revealed that their offering, CS1031 Valley Ridge BFR Housing, DST, has been launched. Capital Square is a top sponsor of tax-advantaged real estate investments and a prolific developer and manager of housing communities. This news comes as a significant development in the industry, showcasing the company's continued growth and innovation.

news.headline: UK rate futures point to about 47 basis points of BoE rate cuts by the end of 2025 vs around 45 BPS before BoE policy announcement.
Clearside Biomedical's publication in Eye journal details retinal drug insights based on a presentation by Dr. Victor Chong.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Clearside Biomedical, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSD) based in Alpharetta, Georgia, revealed that Eye, the official journal of The Royal College of Ophthalmologists, has released a comprehensive overview of key information regarding drug development and regulatory practices discussed during the prestigious Edridge Green Lecture. This lecture was conducted by Dr. Victor Chong, the Chief Medical Officer and Executive Vice President, Head of Research and Development at Clearside. The company specializes in enhancing the administration of treatments to the back of the eye via the suprachoroidal space (SCS®). This publication serves to highlight significant insights shared during the lecture for the benefit of the wider medical community.

news.headline: Explorance's MLY wins Gold for AI in Education Award at QS Reimagine Education Awards for transformative feedback analytics in education.
news.summary: Montreal-based company Explorance, a prominent provider of feedback analytics solutions, has revealed that its AI-driven qualitative analysis tool, Explorance MLY, was honored with the Gold award for the AI in Education category by QS Reimagine Education Awards. This achievement highlights the significant impact of MLY in utilizing artificial intelligence to enhance the analysis of feedback and enhance educational results. Alongside this recognition, Explorance and MLY were also recognized as part of the top 5 finalists for the Global Ed Tech Award, showcasing their expertise and innovation in the education technology sector.

news.headline: Kinaxis offers $40,000 award to support supply chain students at 3 universities - Texas Christian, University of Toronto, Carleton.
news.summary: In honor of its 40th anniversary, Kinaxis® (TSX:KXS), a prominent player in end-to-end supply chain orchestration, revealed a significant move in Ottawa, Ontario. The company disclosed a $40,000 academic grant aimed at aiding students interested in supply chain careers. This initiative involves enhancing collaboration with Texas Christian University, University of Toronto, and Carleton University. Each of these esteemed institutions will receive a share of the award to assist students engaged in the study of supply chain and artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Aeva debuts 4D LiDAR at CES 2025, partnering with automotive leaders, showcasing new tech at event in Las Vegas.
news.summary: Aeva, a prominent company in advanced sensing and perception technology, revealed its involvement in CES 2025, scheduled from January 7th to 10th in Las Vegas. At the event, Aeva will present a cutting-edge long-range high-resolution 4D LiDAR sensor tailored for automotive use. Moreover, they will offer a sneak peek of Torc’s self-driving Freightliner Cascadia truck integrated with Aeva 4D LiDAR™ technology. Additionally, Aeva will highlight a fresh in-cabin LiDAR partnership. This initiative showcases Aeva's commitment to innovation and advancement in the sector.

news.headline: 908 Devices and Getinge partner to integrate bioreactors with MAVEN for automated control of glucose/lactate levels in cell cultures, enabling continuous real-time analysis without manual sampling. #bioprocessing #automation
news.summary: In an exciting collaboration, 908 Devices Inc. (Nasdaq: MASS) and Getinge have joined forces to integrate Getinge's bioreactors with 908 Devices' MAVEN. This partnership aims to automate the control of glucose and lactate levels in cell cultures. The integrated solution will allow scientists to monitor critical process parameters in bioreactors continuously and in real-time. This innovation eliminates the need for manual sampling, streamlining bioprocessing procedures. The collaboration seeks to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of monitoring glucose and lactate levels in cell cultures, benefiting the field of bioprocessing significantly.

news.headline: Aiwyn raises $113M from KKR and Bessemer to enhance tax tech services for top CPA firms, serving 130 of top 500 firms.
news.summary: In Charlotte, N.C., Aiwyn, a reputable technology partner for top Certified Public Accounting firms, has just completed a successful $113 million funding round. The investment was spearheaded by prominent global investment firm KKR and Bessemer Venture Partners, highlighting Aiwyn's dominant position in the accounting technology industry. Currently, Aiwyn caters to 130 out of the top 500 CPA firms, offering cutting-edge automation software aimed at enhancing the efficiency of the complete revenue management process.

news.headline: FiscalNote selected by global fintech and financial firms as partner for policy challenges. Washington-based.
news.summary: FiscalNote has been selected as a crucial partner by numerous global fintech and financial industry companies to help them address intricate policy and regulatory obstacles. The companies have recognized FiscalNote's expertise and capabilities in this area, leading to a significant number of enterprises choosing to work with them.

news.headline: Traders now favour three BoE rate cuts in 2025.
Global industrial fat fraction market to reach $17.04 billion by 2034, with a projected 3% CAGR. Demand rising in various sectors.
news.summary: The global industrial fat fraction market is estimated to reach US$12.69 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow at a CAGR of 3% between 2024 and 2034. These fat fractions are increasingly used in various sectors such as food processing, cosmetics, medications, and industrial lubricants due to their nutritional benefits, stability, and adaptability to specific purposes. The demand for fat fractions as fuel substitutes is also rising with the expanding biodiesel industry. The market is expected to reach US$17.04 billion by 2034, with Japan holding a 4% share of the East Asian market by that time. The East Asian market for fat fractions is projected to grow at a CAGR of 3% from 2024 to 2034. Sales of fat fractions in Canada are also forecasted to increase. Overall, the market is expanding due to new applications and demand from fast-growing sectors in various countries.

news.headline: Graphite market to reach $36.40 billion by 2030 at 15.1% CAGR, driven by EV growth & green tech focus per MarketsandMarkets™.
news.summary: The Graphite Market is expected to increase from USD 15.67 billion in 2024 to USD 36.40 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 15.1%. This growth is attributed to the rising demand for graphite in energy storage technologies, particularly lithium-ion batteries used in electric vehicles and renewable energy sectors. Emerging battery technologies like solid-state and sodium-ion batteries further contribute to the demand for graphite. Industries such as semiconductors, electronics, refractories, steel production, and aerospace also rely on graphite. Sustainability initiatives and graphite's properties like thermal stability and conductivity enhance its importance across various sectors. Key players include companies like AMG, SGL Carbon, and Imerys. Asia Pacific is a significant market region for graphite growth. Key drivers include the increasing production of electric vehicles and renewable energy storage systems, while challenges include finding potential substitutes like carbon nanomaterials. The synthetic graphite segment is projected to have the fastest growth by 2030, with electrode applications being the largest in the market in 2023, and high-purity graphite dominating market share in the same year.

news.headline: Keeper Security had a successful year in 2024 with new products, a Williams Racing partnership, and industry recognition, solidifying its position in cybersecurity leadership.
news.summary: Chicago-based cybersecurity company, Keeper Security, made significant strides in 2024 with the introduction of innovative products, a strategic partnership with Williams Racing, and notable industry accolades. This solidified their position as a leader in the cybersecurity sector. The company's achievements were highlighted in a press release on December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Darden Restaurants reports Q2 results: sales up 6% to $2B; declares dividend; updates financial outlook.
news.summary: Darden Restaurants, Inc. announced its second-quarter financial results for the period ending on November 24, 2024, with a 6.0% increase in total sales to $2... This signifies a growth when compared to the same quarter last year.

BOE predicts 0% GDP growth in 4Q, previously forecasted 0.3%
Bank of England watching for evidence of tight supply or weak demand
Biotech HERVolution Therapeutics secures $11.7M Series A to develop treatments targeting dark genome HERV antigens against cancer & aging diseases.
news.summary: The corporation is developing innovative immunotherapies that enhance the immune system to attack HERV antigens found in the dark genome, aimed at combating cancer, metabolic illnesses, and other age-related diseases. Funding will support the development of a range of readily available assets, with plans to reach various significant milestones, such as commencing various research projects and clinical trials.

news.headline: B2BINPAY reveals brand redesign with updated logo and website to showcase growth and innovation in crypto industry.
news.summary: In Tallinn, Estonia, on December 19, 2024, B2BINPAY, a holistic crypto ecosystem for businesses, revealed a complete brand overhaul showcasing a new logo and an updated website. This revamp highlights the company's emphasis on innovation and its steadfast dedication to staying current in the rapidly evolving crypto industry.

news.headline: Private equity firm Halifax invests in Q-mation, a top industrial automation partner. Investment completed in Dec. 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Halifax Group, a middle-market private equity firm, revealed their recent investment in Q-mation, a prominent industrial automation company. The investment marks a significant milestone in Halifax's partnership strategy with market-leading businesses.

news.headline: Vermilion Energy Inc. announces 2025 budget of $600-$625 million, 8% dividend increase, and strong Germany well results.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on December 19, 2024, Vermilion Energy Inc. shared its latest updates, including the unveiling of the company's 2025 budget. The 2025 budget features a notable 8% increase in dividends for shareholders. Additionally, Vermilion reported promising results from well tests in Germany, indicating strong performance. A key detail from the announcement is the budget allocated for capital expenditures in 2025, which stands at a range of $600 million to $625 million. This signifies a strategic financial commitment by Vermilion as they plan for the upcoming year.

news.headline: Bitflow and Pontis launch first Bitcoin Runes AMM on Bitcoin L2 Stacks, offering deep liquidity and low slippage.
news.summary: Enhancing User Experience with a Genuine AMM for Rune on Bitcoin: Enhancing liquidity, reducing slippage, and speeding up price discovery for Bitcoin assets. The collaboration between Bitflow and Pontis has led to the launch of the inaugural Bitcoin Runes Automated Market Maker (AMM) on Stacks platform in Miami on December 19, 2024. This initiative aims to provide a seamless trading experience by ensuring high liquidity, minimal slippage, and efficient price determination for Bitcoin investments.

news.headline: BingX backs 2024 Vietnam Crypto Market Report: 93.5% investors hopeful for Altcoin Season. #cryptocurrency #Vietnam
news.summary: In Lithuania's capital city of Vilnius on December 19, 2024, BingX, a prominent global cryptocurrency exchange, revealed its involvement in the Vietnam Crypto Market Report 2024. The report was created in partnership with Coin68 and Kyros Ventures. This detailed yearly report offers insights into the cryptocurrency market in Vietnam for the year, shedding light on various aspects.

news.headline: Hamilton Zanze sponsors acquisition of Reserve at Kirkwood, a 264-home apartment community in North Tennessee.
news.summary: A garden-style apartment community comprising 264 homes situated in North Tennessee has been featured in a recent announcement from Hamilton Zanze. This leading multifamily real estate investment firm, headquartered in San Francisco, disclosed their sponsorship for the acquisition of Reserve at Kirkwood.

Lifecore Biomedical to provide CDMO services for NRS-033 opioid use disorder treatment. Includes tech transfer, process assessment, and method validation for Phase 2 trial.
news.summary: Key services encompassing technology transfer, process evaluation, and method validation are being provided for the fill and finish of NRS-033. This initiative is part of preparations for the upcoming Phase 2 trial.

news.headline: Verde Clean Fuels gets $50M investment from Cottonmouth Ventures, a subsidiary of Diamondback Energy.
news.summary: In Houston, Verde Clean Fuels, Inc. revealed a stock purchase deal with Cottonmouth Ventures, LLC, a subsidiary of Diamondback Energy, Inc., for a $50 million equity investment. The agreement involves Cottonmouth acquiring 12.5 million shares of Verde's Class A common stock at a set price. The Parties involved are Verde and Cottonmouth, with Diamondback being the parent company of Cottonmouth. The transaction was disclosed under NASDAQ symbols: VGAS for Verde and FANG for Diamondback.

news.headline: Largo and Stryten Energy partner to create Storion Energy for making vanadium electrolyte & battery components.
news.summary: In Toronto, a recent collaboration between Largo and Stryten Energy has resulted in the establishment of Storion Energy. This new venture focuses on the production of vanadium electrolyte and battery components for long-term energy storage. This joint effort signifies a significant move towards sustainable clean energy solutions.

news.headline: Superior Plus to host Investor Day on April 2, 2025 in Toronto, Canada at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Key executives to present strategic vision and company updates.
news.summary: Superior Plus Corp. (TSX: SPB) will hold an Investor Day in Toronto, Canada on April 2, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Allan MacDonald, President, and CEO, and Grier Colter, CFO, along with other executives, will present on the Company's strategic vision, the "Superior Delivers" initiative, and financial updates. The event aims to provide detailed insights into the firm's direction.

news.headline: Summary: Stryten Energy partners with Largo to launch Storion Energy, aiming to lower costs for electrolyte in vanadium redox flow batteries.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, Stryten Energy LLC, a U.S.-based energy storage solutions provider, disclosed that one of its affiliates, Stryten Critical E-Storage LLC, has entered agreements with a subsidiary of Largo Inc. (NASDAQ, TSX: LGO), known as Largo Clean Energy Corp. (LCE), to establish a new entity named Storion Energy, LLC. The primary objective of this formation is to eliminate obstacles for battery manufacturers to procure domestically produced cost-effective electrolyte utilized in vanadium redox flow batteries (VRFB).

news.headline: ProPetro secures contract for 4th FORCE Electric Hydraulic Fracturing Fleet in Midland, Texas.
news.summary: ProPetro, based in Midland, Texas, has recently secured a contract for the acquisition of a 4th FORCE Electric Hydraulic Fracturing Fleet. This marks a significant development for the company as it expands its fleet capacity. The addition of this new fleet will bolster ProPetro's operations, enabling them to enhance their hydraulic fracturing capabilities.

news.headline: Laser Photonics Corporation wins dual order for CleanTech and MarkStar laser systems from Phillips 66. CEO, Wayne Tupuola, expresses excitement.
news.summary: Orlando-based Laser Photonics Corporation (LPC), a key player in industrial laser systems, has revealed that it recently secured a dual order from Phillips 66, a prominent global oil refiner. The order includes a CleanTech and a MarkStar laser system. Wayne Tupuola, LPC's CEO, expressed excitement about the collaboration, stating, "We are thrilled to have Phillips 66 as our latest client and to provide our advanced laser solutions to a significant U.S. oil refinery." LPC trades on the NASDAQ under the symbol LASE.

news.headline: Northisle reports final 2024 drill results with 55.8m grading 2.20 g/t Au and 0.39% Cu in Vancouver.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Northisle has released the final findings from its 2024 exploration season.

news.headline: Triple Flag to acquire 0.5% GOR royalty on Tres Quebradas lithium project from LRC for US$28 million.
news.summary: In Toronto, Triple Flag Precious Metals Corp. has disclosed its acquisition of a 0.5% gross overriding revenue royalty on the Tres Quebradas lithium project in Argentina from Lithium Royalty Corp. The total cash consideration for this deal amounts to US$28 million. The Tres Quebradas project, located in Catamarca province, is currently in the construction stage and is fully owned and operated by the Company. This acquisition marks a strategic move for Triple Flag in expanding its portfolio in the precious metals sector.
